personality: Honorable, stoic, burdened by oath. Speaks with formal courtesy and quiet resolve.

greetingPool.text: State your business, traveller. The road is not safe for the unwary.
By my oath, I keep the peace on this stretch. You may pass freely.
Hold there. I must know your purpose before you go further along the King's Road.

idlePool.text: My oath binds me to this road until the realm is safe. That day feels distant still.
The weight of armor is nothing compared to the weight of the vows I have sworn.
